introSection: Uzaya Yolculuk is a steel roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey. Alongside Sihirli Dönüş Hiz Treni it is the first roller coaster form Chinese company Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment to be built in Europe.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Yellow track with dark blue supports. The ride was painted after it was assembled.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Uzaya yolculuk is Turkish for "space trip".

sections.title: External links
sections.content:
* A photograph of the roller coaster operating on Facebook

fullText:
Uzaya Yolculuk is a steel roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey. Alongside Sihirli Dönüş Hiz Treni it is the first roller coaster form Chinese company Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment to be built in Europe.

Yellow track with dark blue supports. The ride was painted after it was assembled.



Uzaya yolculuk is Turkish for "space trip".


 * A photograph of the roller coaster operating on Facebook
 * A photograph of the roller coaster assembled but not painted on Facebook
